rulings.Case Title: NICOLAS GONZALEZ VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Defendant Vanguards Refiled Demurrer And Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 23, 2016 line 1. PLAINTIFF NICOLAS GONZALEZ's Motion To Strike Defendant Vanguards Refiled Demurrer And Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint And For Sanctions DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any case law for the proposition that a demurrer/motion to strike are subject to a motion to strike if they are not filed within 30 days of service of the First Amended Complaint. Request for sanctions is DENIED. The Court notes that Plaintiff failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and failed to provide courtesy copy of the reply filed on August 16, 2016. The reply was considered by the Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLAS GONZALEZ VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Portions Of The First Amended Complaint.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 23, 2016 line 1. DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. Motion To Strike Portions Of The First Amended Complaint. continued to September 20, 2016 for Plaintiff to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition filed on August 9, 2016 to department 501 no later than August 26, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copies of the moving papers, operative complaint, reply and objections to RJN. = (501/REQ)
